text.title: hybrid-search-implementation Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree selecting integration path by backend.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the target vector store offer native server-side hybrid?

branch.conclusion: Pre-compute sparse vectors; use prefetch + FusionQuery.
Train BM25Encoder on full corpus; ship sparse-dense index.
Client-side parallel legs + RRF; do not script_score linear without normalisation.
Skip — this methodology covers four backends.

example.description: For Qdrant, the agent must pre-compute BM25 sparse vectors before insert, then use prefetch + FusionQuery for retrieval.
